sentences.sentence: Henry Moore was born in Castleford, a small town near Leeds in the north of England.
sentences.translation: 亨利·摩尔出生在卡斯尔福德，这是英格兰北部利兹附近的一座小镇。

structure.text: a small town near Leeds in the north of England

difficult_points: was born 是被动形式，但表达“出生”的固定说法。
a small town... 是 Castleford 的同位语，补充说明地点。
near Leeds 与 in the north of England 共同限定小镇的位置。

sentences.sentence: He was the seventh child of Raymond Moore and his wife Mary Baker.
sentences.translation: 他是雷蒙德·摩尔和其妻玛丽·贝克的第七个孩子。

structure.text: the seventh child of Raymond Moore and his wife Mary Baker

difficult_points: He 指 Henry Moore。
the seventh child 表示出生顺序，是表语核心。
of Raymond Moore and his wife Mary Baker 说明父母是谁。

sentences.sentence: He studied at Castleford Grammar School from 1909 to 1915, where his early interest in art was encouraged by his teacher Alice Gostick.
sentences.translation: 1909年至1915年，他在卡斯尔福德文法学校学习；在那里，他早期对艺术的兴趣得到了老师爱丽丝·戈斯蒂克的鼓励。

structure.text: He studied at Castleford Grammar School from 1909 to 1915
where his early interest in art was encouraged by his teacher Alice Gostick
was encouraged by his teacher Alice Gostick

difficult_points: where 引导非限制性定语从句，指 Castleford Grammar School。
was encouraged by 是被动结构，说明兴趣受到老师鼓励。
early interest in art 是被鼓励的对象，而不是他已经成为艺术家。

sentences.sentence: After leaving school, Moore hoped to become a sculptor, but instead he complied with his father's wish that he train as a schoolteacher.
sentences.translation: 离开学校后，摩尔希望成为雕塑家，但他转而遵从父亲的愿望，接受成为学校教师的训练。

structure.text: Moore hoped to become a sculptor
but instead he complied with his father's wish
that he train as a schoolteacher

difficult_points: After leaving school 是省略主语的时间状语，逻辑主语是 Moore。
but instead 表示实际选择与原本愿望相反。
that he train... 是 wish 的内容，从句中 train 使用原形，带有虚拟语气色彩。

sentences.sentence: He had to abandon his training in 1917 when he was sent to France to fight in the First World War.
sentences.translation: 1917年，他被派往法国参加第一次世界大战，因此不得不放弃培训。

structure.text: He had to abandon his training in 1917
when he was sent to France to fight in the First World War
to fight in the First World War

difficult_points: had to 表示外部情况迫使他放弃训练。
when 引导时间从句，同时交代放弃训练的原因背景。
was sent 是被动结构，to fight 表示被派往法国的目的。

sentences.sentence: After the war, Moore enrolled at the Leeds School of Art, where he studied for two years.
sentences.translation: 战后，摩尔进入利兹艺术学院学习，并在那里学习了两年。

structure.text: Moore enrolled at the Leeds School of Art
where he studied for two years

difficult_points: enrolled at 表示进入某学校注册学习。
where 指 the Leeds School of Art。
for two years 表示持续时间。

sentences.sentence: In his first year, he spent most of his time drawing.
sentences.translation: 第一年，他把大部分时间都花在绘画上。

structure.text: spent most of his time drawing

difficult_points: spent most of his time doing 是固定结构，表示把大部分时间用于某事。
drawing 是动名词，说明时间花在什么活动上。
his first year 指他在利兹艺术学院的第一年。

expressions.text: spend most of his time doing
expressions.meaning_zh: 把大部分时间花在做某事上

sentences.sentence: Although he wanted to study sculpture, no teacher was appointed until his second year.
sentences.translation: 虽然他想学习雕塑，但直到第二年才有老师被任命来教授这门课。

structure.text: Although he wanted to study sculpture

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，表示愿望与现实之间的反差。
no teacher was appointed 是被动结构，说明没有教师被安排。
until his second year 表示雕塑课程到第二年才真正有教师。

sentences.sentence: At the end of that year, he passed the sculpture examination and was awarded a scholarship to the Royal College of Art in London.
sentences.translation: 那年年底，他通过了雕塑考试，并获得了前往伦敦皇家艺术学院学习的奖学金。

structure.text: At the end of that year
and was awarded a scholarship to the Royal College of Art in London
to the Royal College of Art in London

difficult_points: passed 与 was awarded 是同一主语 he 的并列谓语。
was awarded 是被动结构，表示奖学金授予给他。
that year 指上一句的 second year。

sentences.sentence: In September 1921, he moved to London and began three years of advanced study in sculpture.
sentences.translation: 1921年9月，他搬到伦敦，并开始了为期三年的雕塑高级学习。

structure.text: moved to London and began three years of advanced study in sculpture
three years of advanced study in sculpture

difficult_points: moved 与 began 是同一主语 he 的连续动作。
advanced study in sculpture 指更高层次的雕塑学习。
In September 1921 明确标出进入伦敦学习阶段的时间。

sentences.sentence: Alongside the instruction he received at the Royal College, Moore visited many of the London museums, particularly the British Museum, which had a wide-ranging collection of ancient sculpture.
sentences.translation: 除了在皇家艺术学院接受教学外，摩尔还参观了伦敦的许多博物馆，尤其是大英博物馆，那里收藏了范围广泛的古代雕塑。

structure.text: Alongside the instruction he received at the Royal College
he received at the Royal College
Moore visited many of the London museums
which had a wide-ranging collection of ancient sculpture

difficult_points: Alongside 表示“除……之外还”，不是单纯的空间并列。
he received at the Royal College 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 instruction。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 the British Museum 的收藏。

sentences.sentence: During these visits, he discovered the power and beauty of ancient Egyptian and African sculpture.
sentences.translation: 在这些参观过程中，他发现了古埃及和非洲雕塑的力量与美。

structure.text: the power and beauty of ancient Egyptian and African sculpture

difficult_points: these visits 指上一句参观伦敦博物馆的经历。
the power and beauty 是并列名词，表示他感受到的艺术特质。
ancient Egyptian and African 共同修饰 sculpture。

sentences.sentence: As he became increasingly interested in these 'primitive' forms of art, he turned away from European sculptural traditions.
sentences.translation: 随着他对这些“原始”艺术形式越来越感兴趣，他转而背离了欧洲雕塑传统。

structure.text: As he became increasingly interested in these 'primitive' forms of art
he turned away from European sculptural traditions

difficult_points: As 表示随着兴趣增强而出现的变化。
these 'primitive' forms of art 指前文的古埃及和非洲雕塑等艺术。
turned away from 表示有意识地远离欧洲雕塑传统。

sentences.sentence: After graduating, Moore spent the first six months of 1925 travelling in France.
sentences.translation: 毕业后，摩尔用1925年的前六个月在法国旅行。

structure.text: spent the first six months of 1925 travelling in France

difficult_points: After graduating 是省略结构，逻辑主语是 Moore。
spent...travelling 是“花时间做某事”的结构。
the first six months of 1925 明确说明旅行持续的时间段。

sentences.sentence: When he visited the Trocadero Museum in Paris, he was impressed by a cast of a Mayan* sculpture of the rain spirit.
sentences.translation: 当他参观巴黎的特罗卡德罗博物馆时，一件玛雅雨神雕塑的模型给他留下了深刻印象。

structure.text: When he visited the Trocadero Museum in Paris
a cast of a Mayan* sculpture of the rain spirit

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，交代他被触动的场景。
was impressed by 是被动表达，表示“被……打动”。
a cast 指雕塑的复制模型，不一定是原作。

sentences.sentence: It was a male reclining figure with its knees drawn up together, and its head at a right angle to its body.
sentences.translation: 它是一尊男性斜倚人像，双膝并拢屈起，头部与身体成直角。

structure.text: a male reclining figure with its knees drawn up together
and its head at a right angle to its body
with its knees drawn up together

difficult_points: It 指上一句提到的 Mayan* sculpture。
reclining figure 表示斜倚姿态的人像。
with its knees drawn up together 是 with 复合结构，说明膝盖姿势。

sentences.sentence: Moore became fascinated with this stone sculpture, which he thought had a power and originality that no other stone sculpture possessed.
sentences.translation: 摩尔对这件石雕着了迷，他认为它拥有其他石雕所没有的力量和原创性。

structure.text: Moore became fascinated with this stone sculpture
which he thought had a power and originality that no other stone sculpture possessed
that no other stone sculpture possessed

difficult_points: became fascinated with 表示逐渐对某物产生强烈兴趣。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明这件石雕的特质。
that no other stone sculpture possessed 修饰 power and originality，说明这些特质独一无二。

sentences.sentence: He himself started carving a variety of subjects in stone, including depictions of reclining women, mother-and-child groups, and masks.
sentences.translation: 他自己也开始用石头雕刻各种题材，包括斜倚女性、母子群像和面具的形象。

structure.text: started carving a variety of subjects in stone
including depictions of reclining women, mother-and-child groups, and masks

difficult_points: himself 强调摩尔亲自开始进行石雕创作。
started carving 后接动名词，表示开始这一创作活动。
including 后列举 a variety of subjects 的具体例子。

sentences.sentence: Moore's exceptional talent soon gained recognition, and in 1926 he started work as a sculpture instructor at the Royal College.
sentences.translation: 摩尔非凡的才华很快得到认可，并且在1926年他开始在皇家艺术学院担任雕塑教师。

structure.text: Moore's exceptional talent soon gained recognition
and in 1926 he started work as a sculpture instructor at the Royal College

difficult_points: gained recognition 表示才华被外界认可。
and 连接声誉提升与开始任教两个结果。
as a sculpture instructor 说明他在皇家艺术学院的身份。

sentences.sentence: In 1933, he became a member of a group of young artists called Unit One.
sentences.translation: 1933年，他成为一个名为“第一单元”的青年艺术家团体的成员。

structure.text: a member of a group of young artists called Unit One

difficult_points: became 后接表语，说明身份变化。
called Unit One 是过去分词短语，修饰 group of young artists。
a member of a group 表示他加入的是一个艺术家群体。

sentences.sentence: The aim of the group was to convince the English public of the merits of the emerging international movement in modern art and architecture.
sentences.translation: 这个团体的目标是让英国公众相信现代艺术与建筑中正在兴起的国际运动具有价值。

structure.text: to convince the English public of the merits of the emerging international movement in modern art and architecture
the emerging international movement in modern art and architecture

difficult_points: to convince... 是表语，说明 aim 的具体内容。
convince A of B 表示“使 A 相信 B”。
emerging 修饰 international movement，表示这一运动正在兴起。

sentences.sentence: Around this time, Moore moved away from the human figure to experiment with abstract shapes.
sentences.translation: 大约在这一时期，摩尔不再以人体形象为中心，转而尝试抽象形状。

structure.text: moved away from the human figure

difficult_points: Around this time 指他加入现代艺术团体前后的时期。
moved away from 表示创作重点从某对象上移开。
to experiment with... 表示转向人体形象之外的目的或方向。

sentences.sentence: In 1931, he held an exhibition at the Leicester Galleries in London.
sentences.translation: 1931年，他在伦敦的莱斯特画廊举办了一场展览。

structure.text: an exhibition at the Leicester Galleries in London

difficult_points: held an exhibition 表示举办展览。
at the Leicester Galleries in London 说明展览地点。
In 1931 把事件放在他转向抽象形状之后的时间线上。

sentences.sentence: His work was enthusiastically welcomed by fellow sculptors, but the reviews in the press were extremely negative and turned Moore into a notorious figure.
sentences.translation: 他的作品受到同行雕塑家的热烈欢迎，但媒体评论极其负面，并使摩尔成为一个声名狼藉的人物。

structure.text: His work was enthusiastically welcomed by fellow sculptors
but the reviews in the press were extremely negative
and turned Moore into a notorious figure

difficult_points: was enthusiastically welcomed 是被动结构，说明同行的积极反应。
but 引出媒体评论与同行评价的强烈反差。
turned Moore into... 表示负面评论造成了他公众形象的变化。

sentences.sentence: There were calls for his resignation from the Royal College, and the following year, when his contract expired, he left to start a sculpture department at the Chelsea School of Art in London.
sentences.translation: 有人要求他辞去皇家艺术学院的职务；第二年，当他的合同到期时，他离开那里，在伦敦切尔西艺术学院创办雕塑系。

structure.text: There were calls for his resignation from the Royal College
he left to start a sculpture department at the Chelsea School of Art in London
to start a sculpture department at the Chelsea School of Art in London

difficult_points: There were calls for... 表示出现了要求他辞职的呼声。
when his contract expired 是插入的时间从句，说明他离开的时间节点。
to start... 表示离开后的目的，即创办新的雕塑系。

sentences.sentence: Throughout the 1930s, Moore did not show any inclination to please the British public.
sentences.translation: 整个20世纪30年代，摩尔都没有表现出任何迎合英国公众的倾向。
difficult_points: Throughout the 1930s 强调这一态度持续了整个十年。
did not show any inclination 表示完全没有显现某种倾向。
to please the British public 修饰 inclination，说明他没有迎合公众的意愿。

sentences.sentence: He became interested in the paintings of the Spanish artist Pablo Picasso, whose work inspired him to distort the human body in a radical way.
sentences.translation: 他开始对西班牙艺术家巴勃罗·毕加索的绘画感兴趣，而毕加索的作品启发他以激进的方式扭曲人体。

structure.text: He became interested in the paintings of the Spanish artist Pablo Picasso
whose work inspired him to distort the human body in a radical way
to distort the human body in a radical way

difficult_points: whose 引导定语从句，表示 Picasso 的作品产生影响。
inspired him to... 表示启发他采取某种创作方式。
in a radical way 说明扭曲人体形象的方式非常激进。

sentences.sentence: At times, he seemed to abandon the human figure altogether.
sentences.translation: 有时，他似乎完全放弃了人体形象。

structure.text: seemed to abandon the human figure altogether
to abandon the human figure altogether

difficult_points: At times 表示这种倾向并非一直如此，而是时有出现。
seemed to 表示外界观察到的印象。
altogether 强调放弃人体形象的程度很彻底。

sentences.sentence: The pages of his sketchbooks from this period show his ideas for abstract sculptures that bore little resemblance to the human form.
sentences.translation: 他这一时期的素描本页面展示了他对抽象雕塑的构想，这些雕塑与人体形态几乎没有相似之处。

structure.text: The pages of his sketchbooks from this period
that bore little resemblance to the human form

difficult_points: The pages... 是主语，核心词是 pages。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 abstract sculptures。
bore little resemblance to 表示与人体形态相似度很低。

sentences.sentence: In 1940, during the Second World War, Moore stopped teaching at the Chelsea School and moved to a farmhouse about 20 miles north of London.
sentences.translation: 1940年，第二次世界大战期间，摩尔停止在切尔西艺术学院任教，搬到伦敦以北约20英里的一座农舍。

structure.text: stopped teaching at the Chelsea School and moved to a farmhouse about 20 miles north of London

difficult_points: In 1940 与 during the Second World War 共同交代时代背景。
stopped teaching 与 moved 是同一主语的两个动作。
about 20 miles north of London 后置说明 farmhouse 的位置。

sentences.sentence: A shortage of materials forced him to focus on drawing.
sentences.translation: 材料短缺迫使他把注意力集中在绘画上。
difficult_points: A shortage of materials 是导致创作方式变化的原因。
force someone to do 表示迫使某人做某事。
drawing 是 focus on 的宾语，说明他转向的活动。

sentences.sentence: He did numerous small sketches of Londoners, later turning these ideas into large coloured drawings in his studio.
sentences.translation: 他画了许多伦敦人的小幅速写，后来又在工作室中把这些构想转化为大型彩色画作。

structure.text: He did numerous small sketches of Londoners
later turning these ideas into large coloured drawings in his studio
turning these ideas into large coloured drawings

difficult_points: did sketches 在这里表示“画速写”。
later turning... 是现在分词短语，说明后续发展。
these ideas 指前半句中的 Londoners 小幅速写所形成的构想。

sentences.sentence: In 1942, he returned to Castleford to make a series of sketches of the miners who worked there.
sentences.translation: 1942年，他回到卡斯尔福德，为在那里工作的矿工创作一系列素描。

structure.text: to make a series of sketches of the miners who worked there

difficult_points: returned to Castleford 表示回到他的出生地。
to make... 表示回去的目的。
who worked there 修饰 miners，there 指 Castleford。

sentences.sentence: In 1944, Harlow, a town near London, offered Moore a commission for a sculpture depicting a family.
sentences.translation: 1944年，伦敦附近的小镇哈洛委托摩尔创作一件描绘家庭的雕塑。

structure.text: for a sculpture depicting a family

difficult_points: a town near London 是 Harlow 的同位语说明。
offered Moore a commission 是双宾语结构，表示委托摩尔创作。
depicting a family 是现在分词短语，修饰 sculpture。

sentences.sentence: The resulting work signifies a dramatic change in Moore's style, away from the experimentation of the 1930s towards a more natural and humanistic subject matter.
sentences.translation: 由此产生的作品标志着摩尔风格的巨大转变：从20世纪30年代的实验性，转向更自然、更具人文主义色彩的题材。

structure.text: a dramatic change in Moore's style
away from the experimentation of the 1930s towards a more natural and humanistic subject matter

difficult_points: The resulting work 指上一句委托创作后产生的作品。
signifies 表示这件作品象征或标志某种变化。
away from...towards... 构成方向对比，说明风格从实验性转向自然和人文题材。

sentences.sentence: He did dozens of studies in clay for the sculpture, and these were cast in bronze and issued in editions of seven to nine copies each.
sentences.translation: 他为这件雕塑做了数十件黏土习作，这些习作随后被铸成青铜，并以每版七到九件的数量发行。

structure.text: He did dozens of studies in clay for the sculpture
and these were cast in bronze and issued in editions of seven to nine copies each
were cast in bronze and issued

difficult_points: studies in clay 指为正式作品准备的黏土习作或研究稿。
these 指前面的 dozens of studies。
were cast...and issued 是并列的被动谓语，说明这些习作如何被制作和发行。

sentences.sentence: In this way, Moore's work became available to collectors all over the world.
sentences.translation: 通过这种方式，世界各地的收藏者都可以买到摩尔的作品。
difficult_points: In this way 指上一句通过铸造和发行多个版本的方式。
became available to 表示作品对某类人变得可获得。
all over the world 修饰 collectors，说明收藏者分布范围。

sentences.sentence: The boost to his income enabled him to take on ambitious projects and start working on the scale he felt his sculpture demanded.
sentences.translation: 收入的增加使他能够承接雄心勃勃的项目，并开始按照他认为自己雕塑所需要的规模进行创作。

structure.text: enabled him to take on ambitious projects and start working
to take on ambitious projects and start working
on the scale he felt his sculpture demanded

difficult_points: The boost to his income 是主语，指收入提升这一变化。
enabled him to... 表示收入增加带来的能力或机会。
he felt his sculpture demanded 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 scale。

sentences.sentence: Critics who had begun to think that Moore had become less revolutionary were proven wrong by the appearance, in 1950, of the first of Moore's series of standing figures in bronze, with their harsh and angular pierced forms and distinct impression of menace.
sentences.translation: 一些评论家开始认为摩尔不再那么具有革命性，但1950年摩尔第一件青铜站立人物系列作品的出现证明他们错了；这些作品有着粗粝、棱角分明且带穿孔的形态，并给人鲜明的威胁感。

structure.text: Critics who had begun to think that Moore had become less revolutionary
who had begun to think that Moore had become less revolutionary
that Moore had become less revolutionary
by the appearance, in 1950, of the first of Moore's series of standing figures in bronze
with their harsh and angular pierced forms and distinct impression of menace

difficult_points: 主语是 Critics，后面的 who 从句说明这些评论家的看法。
were proven wrong 是被动结构，表示后来的作品证明他们判断错误。
by the appearance... 表示证明他们错误的原因或依据，with 短语描述这些青铜人物的特征。

sentences.sentence: Moore also varied his subject matter in the 1950s with such works as Warrior with Shield and Falling Warrior.
sentences.translation: 摩尔在20世纪50年代也通过《持盾战士》和《倒下的战士》等作品改变了自己的题材。

structure.text: with such works as Warrior with Shield and Falling Warrior

difficult_points: varied his subject matter 表示改变或拓展创作题材。
with such works as... 用具体作品举例说明这种变化。
also 表明除了站立人物系列外，他还在题材上有变化。

sentences.sentence: These were rare examples of Moore's use of the male figure and owe something to his visit to Greece in 1951, when he had the opportunity to study ancient works of art.
sentences.translation: 这些作品是摩尔使用男性形象的罕见例子，并且在一定程度上得益于他1951年访问希腊；那次访问中，他有机会研究古代艺术作品。

structure.text: These were rare examples of Moore's use of the male figure
and owe something to his visit to Greece in 1951
when he had the opportunity to study ancient works of art
to study ancient works of art

difficult_points: These 指上一句提到的 Warrior with Shield 和 Falling Warrior。
owe something to 表示这些作品在一定程度上受某经历影响。
when 引导定语从句，补充说明1951年希腊之行的意义。

sentences.sentence: In his final years, Moore created the Henry Moore Foundation to promote art appreciation and to display his work.
sentences.translation: 在晚年，摩尔创立了亨利·摩尔基金会，以促进艺术欣赏并展示他的作品。

structure.text: to promote art appreciation and to display his work

difficult_points: In his final years 指摩尔职业和人生的后期。
to promote...and to display... 是并列不定式，说明创建基金会的目的。
art appreciation 指公众对艺术的理解和欣赏。

sentences.sentence: Moore was the first modern English sculptor to achieve international critical acclaim and he is still regarded as one of the most important sculptors of the 20th century.
sentences.translation: 摩尔是第一位获得国际评论界赞誉的英国现代雕塑家，并且至今仍被认为是20世纪最重要的雕塑家之一。

structure.text: Moore was the first modern English sculptor to achieve international critical acclaim
and he is still regarded as one of the most important sculptors of the 20th century

difficult_points: the first...to achieve... 是“第一个做某事的人”的结构。
international critical acclaim 指国际评论界的认可与赞誉。
is still regarded as 是被动结构，说明当代评价仍然很高。
